description: §18.6 — an `else` arm that is NOT the last arm in a value-form `match` block SHALL fire E-SYNTAX-010. Regression guard: arms after `else` are unreachable; `else` is the catch-all and must sit at the bottom. (Trigger confirmed: in match context the type-system.ts:16490 else-position check fires, NOT the §42 rewrite.ts null-in-value trigger which is a different code path.)
rationale: §18.6: the `else` arm SHALL be the last arm in a `match` block; an `else` followed by further arms is E-SYNTAX-010. Resolution: move `else` to the bottom or remove the trailing arms.
